name: Individual Lemon-Meringue Bread Puddings
recipeIngredient: Finely grated rind and juice of one lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread bread slices in a single layer on an oven tray and place in a 200°C oven.
2. Turn off the oven and leave for 4-5 hours, or until dried.
3. Process bread to fine crumbs in a food processor. This can be done ahead and stored in an airtight container until required.
4. Bring milk almost to simmering point in a saucepan and pour over breadcrumbs in a bowl. Mix to combine. Set aside.
5. Whisk butter, sugar, egg yolks, lemon rind, and juice together. Stir into the breadcrumb mixture and spoon into 6 buttered 1/2 cup souffle dishes.
6. Place in a baking pan and pour in enough hot water to reach halfway up the sides of the dishes.
7. Bake at 180°C for 30 minutes.
8. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add caster sugar and beat until thick and glossy.
9. Top puddings with meringue mixture and return to the oven. Bake for 10 minutes longer, or until golden.
